crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Alphacrypt/TeslaCrypt Ransomware CnC Beacon
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Alphacrypt/TeslaCrypt Ransomware CnC Beacon"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:".php"; endswith; http.header; content:!"driftmania"; http.user_agent; content:"Mozilla"; depth:7; http.host; content:!"coreftp.com"; http.request_body; content:"data="; depth:5; fast_pattern; pcre:"/^[A-F0-9]{100,}$/R"; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; reference:md5,a3440b6117f3783989683753c9f394dd; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2022504; rev:8; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2016_02_11, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, malware_family Ransomware, malware_family Alphacrypt, malware_family TeslaCrypt, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, tag c2, updated_at 2020_09_15, mitre_tactic_id TA0011, mitre_tactic_name Command_And_Control, mitre_technique_id T1041, mitre_technique_name Exfiltration_Over_C2_Channel;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO HTTP POST to WP Theme Directory Without Referer
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO HTTP POST to WP Theme Directory Without Referer"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:"/wp-content/themes/"; fast_pattern; pcre:"/^[^&=?]*\/wp-content\/themes\//i"; http.host; content:!"citytv.com"; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2020822; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2015_03_31, former_category MALWARE, updated_at 2020_08_18;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* without referer
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* without referer"; flow:established,to_server; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"/wp-"; http_uri; http_header_names; content:!"Referer"; threshold:type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:bad-unknown;sid:2610312; rev:1;)
